items.detail: It's no coincidence that Spain are the first nation to hold both the men's and women's World Cups simultaneously. It's been a generation in the making.

items.headline: Lewandowski: Didn't see best Yamal at World Cup
items.detail: Robert Lewandowski praised Lamine Yamal for helping Spain win the FIFA World Cup despite not playing his best football during the tournament due to injury.

items.headline: Lendeborg outduels Boozer; Dubs win Vegas title
items.detail: Yaxel Lendeborg helped the Warriors to their second summer league championship, becoming just the second player to win a Division I NCAA championship and a summer league title in the same year.

items.headline: Bedard: Kane back in Chicago would be 'incredible'...
items.detail: On the day the Blackhawks star met with the media after signing his new contract, Chicago's Connor Bedard made his pitch to winger Patrick Kane to return to the club he began his NHL career with and chase another Stanley Cup.

items.headline: Cards' Adams facing firearm charges in Canada
items.detail: Cardinals OL Isaiah Adams turned himself into police Sunday and is facing four charges related to a guns and gangs investigation in Canada, but a source told ESPN he will report to training camp Wednesday.

items.headline: Man United go retro with royal blue 2026-27 away k...
items.detail: Manchester United have officially debuted their brand-new away kit for the upcoming 2026-27 season, a day after leaking it via British rapper Stormzy.
